rule_60_30_10.description: Every page distributes color across three proportional layers.

layers.use: Primary buttons, active states, links, highlights

rules: NEVER exceed 10% accent color on any page — if it's everywhere, it signals nothing
NEVER use more than one accent color per product — two accent colors require explicit brand justification
The 30% layer creates depth through surface elevation, not color variety
On dark mode: the 60% is darkest, 30% is slightly lighter, 10% is your accent

semantic_usage.use_for: Delete buttons, error messages, form validation failures
Success toasts, completion states, positive metrics
Rate limit warnings, unsaved changes, expiry alerts

semantic_pattern.correct: subtle background + matching border + colored icon + colored text
semantic_pattern.example_classes: bg-danger-subtle border border-danger-border rounded-lg p-4 flex gap-3
semantic_pattern.wrong: Solid semantic color as background (bg-danger text-white) — aggressive, hard to read
semantic_pattern.rule: Always use all three layers together: subtle bg + border + icon/text. Never solid semantic fill.

emphasis_color_guidance.clarity: Neutral surface hierarchy. One accent call-to-action. Low color noise.
emphasis_color_guidance.conversion: Accent color on primary CTA only. Use subtle danger/success for urgency signals. Avoid competitive saturation.
emphasis_color_guidance.trust: Conservative accent use. Prefer --text-secondary for supporting content. Never use warning/danger for decorative purposes.
emphasis_color_guidance.speed: High contrast on interactive elements. Strong hover states. Minimal color transitions — snap, not fade.

page_type_color_guidance.dashboard: Use bg-subtle for data table rows (alternating or hover). Semantic colors for metric deltas. Accent only on primary action.
page_type_color_guidance.landing_page: Accent in hero CTA + 2–3 feature highlights max. Use bg-accent-subtle for section tinting sparingly.
page_type_color_guidance.form: Error state must use all three: danger border + danger-subtle bg + danger icon + message. Success state on completion.
page_type_color_guidance.settings: Mostly neutral. Accent only on active toggle/radio. Danger only on destructive settings (delete account).
page_type_color_guidance.onboarding: Warm, inviting. Accent on progress indicators. Avoid danger completely unless showing a blocking error.
page_type_color_guidance.pricing: Accent on the recommended plan. Use bg-accent-subtle for highlighted tier. Danger sparingly for urgency.
page_type_color_guidance.navigation: Active item: accent text + accent-subtle background. Hover: bg-subtle. Never accent on all items.
